requirement_topic.en: EMC, Electrical Safety and Wireless Approval — SONCAP plus NCC Type Approval
requirement_topic.zh: EMC、电气安全与无线核准——SONCAP加NCC型号核准
requirement_topic.zht: EMC、電氣安全與無線核准——SONCAP加NCC型號核准

summary.en: Power banks (portable battery packs with integrated charging circuitry, USB outputs, and display) are electrical/electronic products subject to SONCAP, with the electrical-safety and EMC aspects assessed against the relevant Nigerian Industrial Standards that adopt IEC/CISPR references (for example IEC 62368-1 for safety of audio/video and IT equipment, and CISPR 32 / CISPR 35 EMC limits as adopted by SON). If the power bank incorporates any wireless or radio function (for example Qi wireless charging output, Bluetooth state-of-charge indicator, NFC), it additionally requires Type Approval from the Nigerian Communications Commission (NCC) before it may be imported, sold, or operated in Nigeria — Nigeria operates on the 230 V, 50 Hz grid (50 Hz shared with China, but nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V). NCC Type Approval certifies that the radio equipment meets Nigerian spectrum and technical requirements and is a separate approval from the SONCAP certificate; both must be in place. The SONCAP Product Certificate plus per-shipment SONCAP Certificate, and (where wireless) NCC Type Approval, are preconditions for customs clearance.
summary.zh: 移动电源（集成充电电路、USB输出及显示屏的便携式电池组）作为电气电子产品须适用SONCAP，其电气安全及EMC方面依据采用IEC/CISPR引用的相关尼日利亚工业标准评定（例如音视频及信息技术设备安全的IEC 62368-1，以及SON采纳的CISPR 32/CISPR 35 EMC限值）。若移动电源含任何无线或射频功能（例如Qi无线充电输出、蓝牙电量指示、NFC），则在进口、销售或在尼日利亚使用前，另须取得尼日利亚通信委员会（NCC）的型号核准——尼日利亚采用230 V、50 Hz电网（50 Hz与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国的220/380 V）。NCC型号核准证明无线设备符合尼日利亚频谱及技术要求，是独立于SONCAP证书的核准；二者须同时具备。SONCAP产品证书加每批次SONCAP证书，以及（含无线时）NCC型号核准，是清关的前提条件。
summary.zht: 行動電源（整合充電電路、USB輸出及顯示幕的便攜式電池組）作為電氣電子產品須適用SONCAP，其電氣安全及EMC方面依據採用IEC/CISPR引用的相關奈及利亞工業標準評定（例如音視頻及資訊技術設備安全的IEC 62368-1，以及SON採納的CISPR 32/CISPR 35 EMC限值）。若行動電源含任何無線或射頻功能（例如Qi無線充電輸出、藍牙電量指示、NFC），則在進口、銷售或在奈及利亞使用前，另須取得奈及利亞通訊委員會（NCC）的型號核准——奈及利亞採用230 V、50 Hz電網（50 Hz與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國的220/380 V）。NCC型號核准證明無線設備符合奈及利亞頻譜及技術要求，是獨立於SONCAP證書的核准；二者須同時具備。SONCAP產品證書加每批次SONCAP證書，以及（含無線時）NCC型號核准，是清關的前提條件。

standards_or_laws: SON Conformity Assessment Programme (SONCAP) — electrical safety and EMC assessment against adopted NIS (IEC 62368-1, CISPR 32, CISPR 35 references)
Nigerian Communications Act, 2003 and NCC Type Approval Regulations — mandatory Type Approval for radio/wireless equipment
NIS adopting CISPR 32 / CISPR 35 — electromagnetic compatibility limits for multimedia equipment

summary.en: China's domestic EMC requirements for electronic products use GB/T 9254.1-2021 (emissions, IT/multimedia equipment) and GB/T 17618-2015 (immunity). Products with wireless functions require SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval administered by MIIT, which is specific to Chinese frequencies and protocol implementations. Electrical safety for many electronics references GB 4943.1 / GB 17625 series. These Chinese GB/T reports and the SRRC approval are domestic instruments; SRRC is not recognised by the NCC, and Chinese GB/T EMC reports are not, by themselves, SONCAP conformity documents for Nigeria.
summary.zh: 中国电子产品国内EMC要求使用GB/T 9254.1-2021（辐射，信息技术/多媒体设备）和GB/T 17618-2015（抗扰度）。含无线功能的产品须取得由工业和信息化部管理的SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准，具体适用于中国频段和协议实现。许多电子产品的电气安全引用GB 4943.1/GB 17625系列。上述中国GB/T报告及SRRC核准属国内文书；SRRC不被NCC认可，中国GB/T EMC报告本身也并非尼日利亚的SONCAP合格评定文件。
summary.zht: 中國電子產品國內EMC要求使用GB/T 9254.1-2021（輻射，資訊技術/多媒體設備）和GB/T 17618-2015（抗擾度）。含無線功能的產品須取得由工業和信息化部管理的SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准，具體適用於中國頻段和協議實現。許多電子產品的電氣安全引用GB 4943.1/GB 17625系列。上述中國GB/T報告及SRRC核准屬國內文書；SRRC不被NCC認可，中國GB/T EMC報告本身也並非奈及利亞的SONCAP合格評定文件。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254.1-2021 — Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics — Part 1: Class B equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB/T 17618-2015 — Information technology equipment — Immunity characteristics — Limits and methods of measurement (SAC)
SRRC type approval — State Radio Regulation of China, MIIT — required for wireless products sold in China

gap.en: Power banks with integrated electronics must clear SONCAP on the electrical-safety and EMC fronts using NIS that adopt IEC 62368-1 and CISPR 32/35 — a Chinese GB/T 9254 report supports engineering review but is not a standalone SONCAP document, and an IEC/CISPR (IECEE CB) report is generally smoother. The decisive added gap for wireless variants is NCC Type Approval: (1) SRRC approval does not transfer to Nigeria; (2) the radio module must meet Nigerian spectrum rules and obtain NCC Type Approval as a separate certificate from SONCAP; (3) both NCC Type Approval and SONCAP must be in place before customs clearance. Voltage handling should be confirmed for the 230 V, 50 Hz Nigerian grid even though the 50 Hz frequency matches China, because nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V.
gap.zh: 含集成电子元件的移动电源须在电气安全和EMC方面通过SONCAP，依据采用IEC 62368-1及CISPR 32/35的NIS——中国GB/T 9254报告可支持工程审查但并非独立SONCAP文件，IEC/CISPR（IECEE CB）报告通常更顺畅。无线型号的决定性附加差距是NCC型号核准：（1）SRRC核准不可转移至尼日利亚；（2）无线模块须符合尼日利亚频谱规则并取得独立于SONCAP的NCC型号核准证书；（3）NCC型号核准与SONCAP须在清关前同时具备。尽管50 Hz频率与中国相同，仍应针对尼日利亚230 V、50 Hz电网确认电压适配，因为标称电压不同于中国的220/380 V。
gap.zht: 含整合電子元件的行動電源須在電氣安全和EMC方面通過SONCAP，依據採用IEC 62368-1及CISPR 32/35的NIS——中國GB/T 9254報告可支持工程審查但並非獨立SONCAP文件，IEC/CISPR（IECEE CB）報告通常更順暢。無線型號的決定性附加差距是NCC型號核准：（1）SRRC核准不可轉移至奈及利亞；（2）無線模組須符合奈及利亞頻譜規則並取得獨立於SONCAP的NCC型號核准證書；（3）NCC型號核准與SONCAP須在清關前同時具備。儘管50 Hz頻率與中國相同，仍應針對奈及利亞230 V、50 Hz電網確認電壓適配，因為標稱電壓不同於中國的220/380 V。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SONCAP electrical-safety/EMC assessment against adopted NIS is required for power banks; NCC Type Approval is mandatory and separate for any wireless/radio function; both must precede customs clearance
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB/T 9254.1 EMC compliance required; SRRC type approval mandatory for wireless products sold in China (administered by MIIT)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Power bank EMC and electrical safety are assessed under SONCAP against NIS that adopt IEC 62368-1 and CISPR 32/35; Chinese GB/T 9254 reports are not standalone SONCAP evidence, and an IEC/CISPR CB report is generally preferred. Any wireless function triggers mandatory NCC Type Approval, which is separate from SONCAP and not satisfied by Chinese SRRC approval. Both SONCAP and NCC Type Approval must be in place before the goods can clear Nigerian customs; voltage suitability for the 230 V, 50 Hz grid should also be confirmed.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 移动电源的EMC及电气安全在SONCAP下依据采用IEC 62368-1及CISPR 32/35的NIS评定；中国GB/T 9254报告并非独立SONCAP证据，通常优选IEC/CISPR CB报告。任何无线功能均触发强制NCC型号核准，其独立于SONCAP且不可由中国SRRC核准满足。SONCAP与NCC型号核准须在货物清关前同时具备；亦应确认对230 V、50 Hz电网的电压适配。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 行動電源的EMC及電氣安全在SONCAP下依據採用IEC 62368-1及CISPR 32/35的NIS評定；中國GB/T 9254報告並非獨立SONCAP證據，通常優選IEC/CISPR CB報告。任何無線功能均觸發強制NCC型號核准，其獨立於SONCAP且不可由中國SRRC核准滿足。SONCAP與NCC型號核准須在貨物清關前同時具備；亦應確認對230 V、50 Hz電網的電壓適配。
